question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery takes 3–5 business days. Remote areas may take 6–8 business days.

question: What is the estimated delivery time?
answer: Orders are usually delivered within 3–5 business days.

question: When will my package arrive?
answer: Your package typically arrives within 3–5 working days.

question: Is express delivery available?
answer: Yes, express delivery is available in selected cities within 1–2 business days.

question: Why is my order delayed?
answer: Delays may occur due to high demand, weather conditions, or courier issues.

question: My order is late. What should I do?
answer: Please check tracking details first. If delayed beyond the expected date, contact support.

question: How can I track my shipment?
answer: You can track your shipment using the tracking link sent to your email.

question: Where can I see tracking updates?
answer: Tracking updates are available in the Orders section of your account.

question: Tracking link is not working.
answer: Please wait a few hours and try again. If the issue persists, contact support.

question: I didn’t receive a tracking email.
answer: Check your spam folder or log into your account to view tracking details.

question: Can I cancel my purchase?
answer: Orders can be canceled within 30 minutes of placing them.

question: How do I cancel an order?
answer: Go to your Orders section and select Cancel if available.

question: Why can't I cancel my order?
answer: Orders cannot be canceled once shipped.

question: Can I change my delivery address?
answer: Address changes are allowed before the order is shipped.

question: How do I update my order details?
answer: Order details can be modified before shipment from your account.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: Items can be returned within 7 days of delivery in original condition.

question: How long do I have to return an item?
answer: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery.

question: How do I initiate a return?
answer: Go to Orders > Select item > Click Return and follow instructions.

question: Is return pickup free?
answer: Yes, return pickup is free for eligible products.

question: Where is my return request status?
answer: You can check return status in the Orders section.

question: When will I get my money back?
answer: Refunds are processed within 3–5 business days after approval.

question: How long does refund take?
answer: Refunds usually reflect within 5 business days.

question: My refund is delayed.
answer: Refunds may take 5–7 working days depending on your bank.

question: How will I receive my refund?
answer: Refunds are issued to the original payment method.

question: Can I get refund in wallet?
answer: Yes, you may choose wallet refund during return request.

question: What payment options do you accept?
answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and wallets.

question: My payment failed but money was deducted.
answer: Failed payments are auto-refunded within 3–5 business days.

question: Is cash on delivery available?
answer: Cash on delivery is available for eligible locations.

question: How can I download my invoice?
answer: Invoices can be downloaded from the Orders section.

question: Do you provide GST invoices?
answer: Yes, GST invoices are available for eligible orders.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: Click Sign Up and register using your email or phone number.

question: I can't log into my account.
answer: Try resetting your password using the Forgot Password option.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Please contact customer support to permanently delete your account.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click Forgot Password on login page and follow instructions.

question: How can I update my profile details?
answer: Profile details can be updated in Account Settings.

question: Is this product in stock?
answer: Stock availability is shown on the product page.

question: When will this product be back?
answer: Restock dates vary. Please enable Notify Me option.

question: Where can I see product specifications?
answer: Specifications are listed under the product description section.

question: Where is the size chart?
answer: Size chart is available on the product page under Size Guide.

question: Does this product have warranty?
answer: Warranty details are mentioned in product description.

question: Can I exchange an item?
answer: Yes, exchanges are available for eligible products within 7 days.

question: How do I request an exchange?
answer: Select Exchange option in Orders section.

question: I received a damaged product.
answer: Please upload images in return request for quick resolution.

question: I received the wrong item.
answer: We apologize. Please initiate return with reason Wrong Item.

question: An item is missing from my order.
answer: Please contact support within 24 hours of delivery.

question: Delivery executive didn't contact me.
answer: Please check your phone number is correct and contact support.

question: Can I reschedule my delivery?
answer: Yes, rescheduling options are available via tracking link.

question: My address was incorrect.
answer: Address updates are possible before shipment only.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Currently, we ship only within India.

question: Do you offer bulk discounts?
answer: Please contact our sales team for bulk purchase inquiries.

question: My coupon code is not working.
answer: Ensure the coupon is valid and applicable to selected items.

question: How do I use a gift card?
answer: Enter gift card code at checkout.

question: How can I earn loyalty points?
answer: You earn points on every purchase.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Subscriptions can be canceled in Account > Subscriptions.

question: How do I unsubscribe from emails?
answer: Click Unsubscribe at bottom of promotional emails.

question: How can I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach us via chat, email, or call support helpline.

question: What are your support hours?
answer: Support is available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM.

question: How do I give feedback?
answer: You can submit feedback through Contact Us page.

question: How do I file a complaint?
answer: Please email support with order details and issue description.

question: Is my data safe?
answer: We follow strict data privacy and security policies.

question: I didn't receive order confirmation.
answer: Check spam folder or login to confirm order status.

question: Can I combine two orders?
answer: Orders cannot be combined once placed.

question: Will I get full refund?
answer: Refund amount depends on product condition and return reason.

question: Is EMI available?
answer: EMI is available on selected products via supported banks.

question: When will cashback be credited?
answer: Cashback is credited within 7 business days after delivery.

question: Where can I download your app?
answer: Our app is available on Google Play Store and Apple App Store.

question: App is not working properly.
answer: Please update the app or reinstall it.

question: Website is not loading.
answer: Try clearing cache or using another browser.

question: Why is my account locked?
answer: Accounts may be locked due to suspicious activity.

question: I didn't receive OTP.
answer: Please check network connection and retry after a minute.
